final_prompt.prompt:
Create an educational infographic card for children explaining the Battle of Red Cliffs (赤壁之战) from the Three Kingdoms era.

Style/medium: flat vector educational illustration, single large knowledge card layout, cartoon storybook style with friendly rounded shapes, age-appropriate for children
Subject: Battle of Red Cliffs (赤壁之战) historical event with simplified narrative elements — fire ships, river battle, key figures depicted as stylized cartoon characters
Composition: single large rectangular knowledge card, title area at top, main illustration occupying center-right, bullet-point summary list on left side with clear punctuation
Scene/backdrop: simplified Yangtze River setting with stylized boats, flames, and sky, clean background without clutter
Color palette: warm oranges and reds for fire elements, cool blues for water, neutral background for readability, high contrast for text legibility
Text (verbatim): "赤壁之战"
Constraints: title must be prominent and readable; key points must be listed beside illustration with proper punctuation; visual storytelling must be clear for children; single card format only
Avoid: realistic violence or gore; complex military details unsuitable for children; cluttered layout; multiple cards or pages; tiny illegible text
